assets.display_name: Meshy Image Segmented Droid Meshy 5 Geometry Probe v0
assets.baseline: godot deterministic segmented droid source in generated/meshy_image_droid_v0
assets.changed_variable: Use our own project-generated blockcraft droid render as image-to-3D source; no texture/refine pass.
acceptance_notes: Must preserve the segmented blockcraft droid silhouette better than text prompts did.
Must not become a smooth organic low-poly figure.
Direct keep requires clean GLB validation and a Godot capture beside the deterministic baseline.
If it fails, keep only as evidence that image-to-3D does not solve the voxel style lock.
